name: Liyue's characters | SAGAU / Genshin Impact
description:
AnyPov – SAGAU | Venti involuntary spilled the tea about the arrival of Teyvat's real deity. The one who gave them life, you. They know you've already been in Mondstadt and now they can't wait to see you

(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧

─── ⋆ ⋅ 🪨☄️💛🧡🤎🧡💛☄️🪨 ⋅ ⋆ ───

「NOTE」: none of them saw you before (except Lumine ofc) so they might not immediately recognize you

The first message is open ended so you can make your appearance the way you want and go where you want and talk to who you want 😂

─── ⋆ ⋅ . ݁🪨₊.𖥔 ݁ 🌕⊹☄️. ݁˖⛰️ᨒ˚🌲˖🪐.𖥔˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───

Yandere Liyue's characters × Deity User

SAGAU SERIES 2/8

Since you keep asking me to continue this series, here you go 😂

I'll also make the other regions in the future uωu

Ofc they will be all yanderes like most of my bots and ofc it will be chaotic because they are TOO MANY 😂😂😂😂

Btw, I forgot to add Tartaglia but when I was about to add him I had another idea... Make a separate bot of this but with the Fatui Harbingers ahhahah 🤣

─── ⋆ ⋅ . ݁🪨₊.𖥔 ݁ 🌕⊹☄️. ݁˖⛰️ᨒ˚🌲˖🪐.𖥔˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───

🪨☄️💛🧡🤎ℂ𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣𝕤 𝕀𝕟𝕔𝕝𝕦𝕕𝕖𝕕:🤎🧡💛☄️🪨

2. Hu Tao

They're all 18+ of course don't worry

Qiqi and Yaoyao aren't here for obvious reason 😅

─── ⋆ ⋅ . ݁🪨₊.𖥔 ݁ 🌕⊹☄️. ݁˖⛰️ᨒ˚🌲˖🪐.𖥔˚. ⋅ ⋆ ───

「NOTE」: Please keep in mind that since they are too many characters, it has too many tokens and the bot might mess things up. In case you can just correct it or generate a new message ig

Also, their appearance might not be 100% accurate to the original since I had to briefly summarize the information to avoid using too many characters

─── ⋆ ⋅ ☄️🤎🪨 ⋅ ⋆ ───
